message:
Command `PROJECT_PATH="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_NAME="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/$DESIGN_NAME"
WRAPPER_DIR="$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper"

echo "=== Pre-run checks ==="
# Verify all VERILOG_FILES exist
echo "--- Checking key RTL sources ---"
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/external/hazard3/hdl/hazard3_core.v 2>/dev/null && echo "hazard3 OK" || echo "MISSING hazard3"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/lef/CF_SRAM_1024x32.lef 2>/dev/null && echo "CF_SRAM LEF OK" || echo "MISSING CF_SRAM LEF"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/gds/CF_SRAM_1024x32.gds 2>/dev/null && echo "CF_SRAM GDS OK" || echo "MISSING CF_SRAM GDS"
ls "$WRAPPER_DIR/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def" && echo "DEF template OK"
ls "$WRAPPER_DIR/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.sdc" && echo "SDC OK"
ls "$WRAPPER_DIR/pdn_cfg.tcl" && echo "PDN cfg OK"
ls "$WRAPPER_DIR/macro.cfg" && echo "macro.cfg OK"

echo ""
echo "=== Launching librelane wrapper run ==="
echo "Tag: wrapper_run | Dir: $WRAPPER_DIR"
echo "Start time: $(date)"` executed with exit code 0.

message.content: Paths confirmed. LibreLane v3.0.2 is available. Wrapper config is complete with 32× CF_SRAM macros, 25 ns clock, 4278×3778 µm die. Chip config is absent — will create it after the wrapper hardens. Launching the wrapper run now.
